title: Navigating the Moral Maze: The Ethics of Artificial Intelligence

questions.sentence: Artificial intelligence (AI) is no longer a concept confined to science fiction; it's a driving force reshaping industries, economies, and daily lives worldwide.
However, as AI systems become increasingly sophisticated and integrated into our society, profound ethical dilemmas emerge, demanding careful consideration and proactive solutions.
One of the most pressing concerns revolves around algorithmic bias.
Another significant challenge is data privacy.
Accountability and transparency also pose complex questions.
Ultimately, the goal is to develop 'human-centric AI' – technology that augments human capabilities, respects fundamental rights, and contributes positively to societal well-being.
